protein_name: Catalyzes the hydrolysis of GTP bound to the 40S ribosomal initiation complex (40S.mRNA.Met-tRNA[F].eIF-2.GTP) with the subsequent joining of a 60S ribosomal subunit resulting in the release of eIF-2 and the guanine nucleotide. The subsequent joining of a 60S ribosomal subunit results in the formation of a functional 80S initiation complex (80S.mRNA.Met-tRNA[F]). Belongs to the eIF-2-beta/eIF-5 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: eukaryotic initiation factor eIF2 binding; GDP-dissociation inhibitor activity; GTP binding; GTPase activator activity; nucleotide binding; protein binding; translation initiation factor activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: formation of cytoplasmic translation initiation complex; regulation of translational initiation; ribosome assembly; translation; translational initiation
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: eIF-5; EIF-5A; EIF5; Eukaryotic translation initiation factor 5; IF5
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.41 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
